title: Native Pi TUI daemon dogfood proof
goal: Prove the opt-in daemon-owned native Pi TUI worker path in a real Khazad-Doom run by having a Herdr-hosted Pi TUI worker make a tiny in-scope evidence commit and submit its final result through submit_worker_result.
acceptance: Create docs/design/evidence/tui-worker-daemon-dogfood-2026-07-08.md with a short note that this slice was executed by a daemon-launched native Pi TUI worker and that the authoritative result must be the submit_worker_result artifact, not terminal text.
Do not modify Rust source, package metadata, extension source, scripts, or existing design docs; this proof slice is intentionally limited to the new evidence note and this slice file.
Commit the evidence note in the worker worktree and submit a complete worker result using submit_worker_result.
must_ask_if: The worker would need to modify files outside this slice's areas.
The worker would treat terminal text, Herdr pane text, Herdr scrollback, Herdr metadata, or Pi display state as authoritative worker result evidence.
The worker would bypass submit_worker_result or daemon-owned verification.
